title: Junior Business Development Manager at CBRE India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at CBRE India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!
